creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
The auto-generated github distfile is not the same as the official distfile provided on the project website.  Please only use the USE_GITHUB=yes distfile if that is indeed the official distfile of the project or if there is a technical reason not to use the official distfile.

Note that your patch changes the behaviour of the program: it now no longer ignores the TZ environment variable.  I hope this change was intentional.  As upstream merged the patch, it probably was.

Please change back to the official distfile or provide a technical reason for using the github distfile.  Will recheck your patch after that.  Looks fine otherwise.
